349.reason: [should append tempChar ('|') instead of source.charAt(curPos), which may be out of bounds or incorrect when curPos hasn't been validated]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [should append tempChar ('|') instead of source.charAt(curPos), which may be out of bounds or incorrect when curPos hasn't been validated]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This line incorrectly appends the next character without checking if curPos is within bounds. Moreover, it should append the current '|' (tempChar), not source.charAt(curPos). This causes an IndexOutOfBoundsException when '|' is the last character on a line, and also misrepresents the token.]
